package rulecoverage

func NegativeJsonEncoderRecreatedPerItem() string {
    ruleID := "json_encoder_recreated_per_item"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "json.NewEncoder(...) constructed repeatedly inside loops instead of reusing a stable encoder per stream."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
